name: http-server-minimal
description: Zero-dependency HTTP server with JSON routing, error handling, and CORS

name: input-validator
description: Zod-like schema validation: string, number, boolean, object, array, optional, with chaining

name: structured-logger
description: Structured JSON logger with levels, correlation IDs, timestamps, and child loggers

name: cursor-pagination
description: Cursor-based pagination with Base64 encoding, forward/backward navigation

name: circuit-breaker
description: Circuit breaker: closed/open/half-open states with configurable threshold, cooldown, and event tracking

name: retry-with-backoff
description: Generic async retry with exponential backoff, jitter, and abort signal support

name: event-bus
description: Typed event bus with on, off, once, emit, and waitFor (promise-based)

name: middleware-chain
description: Express-like async middleware pipeline with use(), compose, and error handling
